name: @ge/byo-systems
description: Bring-Your-Own-System core: list the generator's known simulated systems, validate + spawn LLM/heuristic synthesis of a brand-new system from an NL description, samples, or an OpenAPI spec, and bind a system to a live twin/MCP/REST target. Every path is injected ({repoRoot} or explicit registryPath/synthesizeScript/python/dir) — no apps/*/tools/* imports, no assumption about where this package itself lives on disk.
